lessons.title: History and Purpose of NDT and PT
objectives: Summarize the historical development of nondestructive testing and liquid penetrant testing
Explain the purpose of PT and the types of discontinuities it can reveal
cp105Topics: 1.1 Brief history of nondestructive testing and liquid penetrant testing (PT)

lessons.title: Basic Principles of PT: Capillary Action
objectives: Explain capillary action, surface wetting, and how penetrants enter and exit discontinuities
Relate dwell time, surface tension, and viscosity to indication formation

lessons.title: Penetrant Types and Personnel Qualification
objectives: Identify the types of liquid penetrants commercially available (Type 1 fluorescent, Type 2 visible) and their removal methods
Describe the method of personnel qualification and certification for PT
cp105Topics: 1.4 Types of liquid penetrants commercially available
